import PageExample from '@site/src/components/PageExample';
import { ForbiddenPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<PageExample>
  <ForbiddenPage
    serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
    languages={[
      { code: 'en', label: 'English' },
      { code: 'am', label: 'አማርኛ' },
    ]}
    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    onLogin={() => {}}
    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}
    copyright="© 2026 Government of Ethiopia."
  />
</PageExample>

Access denied — explains the citizen lacks access without revealing
whether the resource exists or which specific permission is missing
(prevents information leakage). Leads with **Log in**, since that's the
most common cause.

```tsx
import { ForbiddenPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<ForbiddenPage
  serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
  languages={[{ code: 'en', label: 'English' }]}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* … */ }}
  onLogin={() => { /* … */ }}
/>
```

## When to use this template

Render this whenever a citizen requests a resource they aren't signed in
for or don't have permission to view. The host application is
responsible for returning the actual HTTP `403` status; this component
only renders the page body.

## Accessibility & localization

- One `<h1>`, the standard chrome, and a skip link.
- The **Log in** button is a real, primary, keyboard-operable action —
  not just a link buried in prose.
- All text is a `labels` prop with English defaults, overridable per
  locale.

## Plain HTML

Same chrome as the [404 page](404-page#plain-html) — only the `main`
content and the primary action change. See the
[template's own HTML Example](https://github.com/yidnekachewkibru/ethgov-design-system/blob/main/packages/ethds-templates/templates/403-page.md#html-example)
for the full page.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `serviceName` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `homeHref` | `string` (default `'/'`) | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `onLogin` | `() => void` | Yes |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `labels` | `Partial<ForbiddenPageLabels>` | No |
